advancements.alien-invasion.city.descrip: Reach the giant city of the Swarm
advancements.alien-invasion.city.title: Neon Hive
Hold a shard of dark matter
advancements.alien-invasion.geared_up.de: Craft a hazmat chestplate — the contamination is spreading
advancements.alien-invasion.homeworld.de: Step through the rift into the Swarm's homeworld
advancements.alien-invasion.metallurgist: Smelt both a platinum and a palladium ingot
advancements.alien-invasion.mother_slaye: Slay the Swarm Mother and end the invasion
advancements.alien-invasion.planet_destr: Destroy the Swarm's planet with the hunter's reactor
advancements.alien-invasion.root.descrip: They came for our world. Survive.
advancements.alien-invasion.root.title: The Invasion
advancements.alien-invasion.star_alloy.d: Forge a nibirium ingot from platinum and palladium
advancements.alien-invasion.star_guardia: Assemble the full Cosmic armor set
advancements.alien-invasion.the_beacon.d: Craft the Swarm Beacon — call her down and end this
message.alien-invasion.gravity_boots.mis: Wear Gravity Boots to toggle levitation
message.alien-invasion.mask.none: Hold a mask in hand to put it on
tooltip.alien-invasion.acid_spitter_spaw: Acid charges dissolve armor faster than you can retreat.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_alloy: A biometal alloy — hard as basalt, alive as muscle. The foundation of organic weaponry.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_battery.lor: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_beacon.lore: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_blaster.lor: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_breacher_sp: Walls are no obstacle. It remembers where you are and digs straight.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_brute_spawn: The Swarm's heavy infantry. Armor for two, fury for an entire squad.
Medium chemical protection. Full set significantly slows Infection and Irradiation accumulation.
Reinforced chemical suit, upgraded for harsh environments.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_chem_chestp: Medium chemical protection. Full set significantly slows Infection and Irradiation accumulation.
Reinforced chemical suit, upgraded for harsh environments.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_chem_helmet: Medium chemical protection. Full set significantly slows Infection and Irradiation accumulation.
Reinforced chemical suit, upgraded for harsh environments.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_chem_leggin: Medium chemical protection. Full set significantly slows Infection and Irradiation accumulation.
Reinforced chemical suit, upgraded for harsh environments.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_chicken_spa: The Swarm's mark is a death sentence. This chicken hands them out.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_flesh.lore: Pulses with slow, rhythmic movements. Spreads contamination nearby.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_grunt_spawn: The first of them appeared at dawn. Organized, silent, purposeful.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_hazmat_boot: Light chemical protection. Full set slows Infection and Irradiation accumulation.
Made from alien hides, providing standard barrier protection.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_hazmat_ches: Light chemical protection. Full set slows Infection and Irradiation accumulation.
Made from alien hides, providing standard barrier protection.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_hazmat_helm: Light chemical protection. Full set slows Infection and Irradiation accumulation.
Made from alien hides, providing standard barrier protection.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_hazmat_legg: Light chemical protection. Full set slows Infection and Irradiation accumulation.
Made from alien hides, providing standard barrier protection.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_heart.funct: The beating heart of Swarm contamination.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_heart.lore: Emits a strong psychic signal and triggers local mutation processes.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_hive.lore: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_raptor_spaw: Spawns a Swarm Raptor, a fast and agile predatory creature.
A swift pack hunter of the Swarm, capable of closing distances instantly.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_residue.lor: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_scrap: Fragments of biomechanical construction. The Swarm produces no waste — every piece serves a purpose. We haven't figured out which one yet.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_skin.lore: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_stalker_spa: In the dark — only eyes. Then — nothing.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_stash.lore: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_tendrils.lo: Clings to walls, grasping for any passing heat source.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_troll_spawn: It doesn't kill you right away. It steals everything — then watches what you'll do.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_worker_spaw: Swarm workers don't fight. They silently collect everything of value and carry it back to the Hive.
tooltip.alien-invasion.astral_prism_boot: Supreme defense, fire resistance. Chance to negate poison damage. Full set: caps Infection at 75% (prevents death), grants 100% poison damage immunity, and turns Infection into buffs (Haste II, Absorption, Saturation).
Boots that hover slightly off the ground, negating friction.
tooltip.alien-invasion.astral_prism_ches: Supreme defense, fire resistance. Chance to negate poison damage. Full set: caps Infection at 75% (prevents death), grants 100% poison damage immunity, and turns Infection into buffs (Haste II, Absorption, Saturation).
A chestplate crafted from dense astral alloy, impervious to earthly weapons.
Fires concentrated starlight beams that pierce through multiple enemies.
Channels the refractive power of stars to annihilate molecular bonds in its path.
tooltip.alien-invasion.astral_prism_helm: Supreme defense, fire resistance. Chance to negate poison damage. Full set: caps Infection at 75% (prevents death), grants 100% poison damage immunity, and turns Infection into buffs (Haste II, Absorption, Saturation).
Forged from starlight, bending visual spectrums to shield the wearer.
tooltip.alien-invasion.astral_prism_ingo: Fabled endgame metal. Used to craft supreme weapons and armor.
A solid block of cosmic light, bending reality around its perfectly flat surface.
tooltip.alien-invasion.astral_prism_legg: Supreme defense, fire resistance. Chance to negate poison damage. Full set: caps Infection at 75% (prevents death), grants 100% poison damage immunity, and turns Infection into buffs (Haste II, Absorption, Saturation).
Leggings flowing with nebulous energy, enhancing movement and protection.
tooltip.alien-invasion.astral_resonance_: Creates a distortion wave that shatters blocks and breaks enemy armor.
Resonates on high-frequency astral wavelengths to destabilize dense materials.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_axe: One strike at the base — and the entire tree falls. The Swarm respects efficiency.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_blade: Grown from Swarm biomass. It drinks blood like a living thing. Every strike infects — the wound won't heal.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_fiber: Organic matter from alien tissue. Warm to the touch. Don't think about it — just use it.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_filter_mask.f: Mask slot (worn over armor). Sealed: lets you breathe in toxic gas and acid rain while its air lasts — refill with an Air Canister. Solid spore and radiation filter.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_filter_mask.l: A sealed filter core keeps working even outside a full suit.
Mask slot. Light spore and radiation filter. NOT sealed — it won't save you in toxic gas or acid rain.
Rags and charcoal. Better than breathing it raw.
tooltip.alien-invasion.gas_mask.function: Mask slot. Top tier: sealed, strongest filter, and night vision in dark contaminated zones. Burns air in toxic gas — refill with a canister.
tooltip.alien-invasion.gas_mask.lore: Surplus war gear. Whatever's out there, you'll see it first.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_grappling_hoo: A living grapple from Swarm organics. Pulls you to blocks — or enemies to you. The choice is always yours.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_hoe: Plows a field and sows seeds in one pass. The land resists — briefly.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_pickaxe: Senses ore through stone. Glows when something valuable is nearby.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_serum.lore: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_shovel: Digs a shoulder-width trench in a single sweep.
tooltip.alien-invasion.black_market_term: Allows trading credits and shards for exotic alien technology.
A terminal connected to a network of smugglers operating in the shadows.
tooltip.alien-invasion.blink_core.lore: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bloody_barrel.fun: Gore-covered block. Wiped clean by right-clicking or water.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bloody_barrel.lor: Retains its original structure underneath the thick layer of blood.

Retains its original structure underneath the thick layer of blood.

tooltip.alien-invasion.blueprint_table.f: Used to plan and engineer advanced defensive systems.
tooltip.alien-invasion.blueprint_table.l: Scattered drafts and schematics of weapons that shouldn't exist.
Remnants of crates from the research facility, breached during the initial attack.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cave_lurker_spawn: The mines are no longer safe. It waits in the dark.
tooltip.alien-invasion.chitin_boots.1: Silent and light — the Swarm won't hear your footsteps.
tooltip.alien-invasion.chitin_chestplate: Grown in the Hive's biomass — turned against it.
A full set removes poison, infection and hunger.
tooltip.alien-invasion.chitin_helmet.2: Cheaper than it looks — and tougher than it appears.
tooltip.alien-invasion.chitin_leggings.1: Flexible as muscle. Hard as bone.
tooltip.alien-invasion.comms_beacon.lore: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.contaminated_bone: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.contaminated_food: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_block.lore: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_boots.func: Cosmic defense. Full set grants complete immunity to Infection and Irradiation.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_boots.lore: You step on infected ground — it retreats. Full set: complete immunity to Infection and Irradiation.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_chestplate: Cosmic defense. Full set grants complete immunity to Infection and Irradiation.
Fused with star metal. Nothing earthly can touch it. Full set: complete immunity to Infection and Irradiation.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_credit: A shimmering token of extraterrestrial mint. Who built this black market is unknown. The important thing is that it works.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_crystal_or: Ore block. Requires nibirium pickaxe. Yields cosmic shards when mined.
Formed under intense cosmic energy from falling meteors.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_helmet.fun: Cosmic defense. Full set grants complete immunity to Infection and Irradiation.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_helmet.lor: Blocks the Swarm's psionic signals. The voices in your head go quiet. Full set: complete immunity to Infection and Irradiation.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_ingot.lore: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_leggings.f: Cosmic defense. Full set grants complete immunity to Infection and Irradiation.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_leggings.l: Passed through the heart of a star. Nothing is more durable. Full set: complete immunity to Infection and Irradiation.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_ore.lore: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_pickaxe: Stone no longer resists. Just press — and it's gone.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_shard.lore: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_warhammer: Two fists in one strike. The ground cracks, enemies scatter.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cracked_alien_pip: Leaks trace amounts of toxic gases and alien fluids into the air.
tooltip.alien-invasion.dark_matter_ore.l: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.dark_matter_shard: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.drill_spawn_egg.l: Something is buzzing underfoot. The Swarm is digging toward you.
tooltip.alien-invasion.emeradium_boots.f: Elite netherite-level protection. Caps max radiation at 50%.
tooltip.alien-invasion.emeradium_boots.l: Absorbs ground impacts and cushions heavy steps.
tooltip.alien-invasion.emeradium_chestpl: Elite netherite-level protection. Caps max radiation at 50%.
Plated with crystalline alloy to deflect high-velocity projectiles.
Elite netherite-level protection. Caps max radiation at 50%.
Upgraded helmet embedded with resonant crystals that shield the mind.
tooltip.alien-invasion.emeradium_ingot.f: Crystalline alloy of emerald and nibirium used for elite gear upgrades.
tooltip.alien-invasion.emeradium_ingot.l: A shimmering fusion of organic crystal and alien metallurgy, pulsing with energy.
tooltip.alien-invasion.emeradium_legging: Elite netherite-level protection. Caps max radiation at 50%.
Jointed plates offering great mobility and reinforcement.
tooltip.alien-invasion.emeradium_resonat: Unlocks black market trades, discounts shard costs, and gives 2x smelt chance.
Captures encrypted smuggler frequencies through dense alien interference.
Highly durable shield blocking attacks and absorbing kinetic energy.
Reinforced with crystalline emerald layers to reflect impacts back at attackers.
tooltip.alien-invasion.emp_grenade.lore: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.geiger_counter.lo: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.gravity_boots.fun: Toggle low-gravity drift with the keybind. Fall damage is always negated while worn, and they count as set boots.
tooltip.alien-invasion.gravity_boots.lor: Emergency stabilizers stay awake even when levitation is off.
tooltip.alien-invasion.gravity_grenade.l: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.gravity_gun.lore: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.green_ray_blaster: Fires high-velocity corrosive green ray bursts that melt armor.
A bio-weapon that harnesses chemical toxicity to disintegrate target defenses.
tooltip.alien-invasion.hazmat_boots.1: Rubber soles insulate from infected soil.
tooltip.alien-invasion.hazmat_chestplate: A full set is the only reliable defense against the Swarm's radiation fields.
tooltip.alien-invasion.hazmat_helmet.1: A dual-filter mask. The air outside isn't what it was.
tooltip.alien-invasion.herbal_salve.lore: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.hive_core.lore: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.hive_shaman_spawn: It heals its own. It accelerates its own. Kill it first — before it's too late.
tooltip.alien-invasion.hive_tyrant_spawn: The Hive's commander. His presence lights up the Geiger counter and extinguishes morale.
Spawns the Hunter, a deadly elite combat unit of the Swarm.
A bio-engineered predator designed to track and eliminate human resistance.
tooltip.alien-invasion.hunter_token.lore: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infected_water_bu: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infection_pills.l: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_creeper_: It explodes — and leaves behind not a crater, but an acid pool.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_diamond_: The diamond survived. But something has grown through the crystal lattice. Be careful when mining.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_flesh.lo: Infected meat feeds the body. What it does to the mind — better not to test.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_grass.lo: Purple spores on a green background. The land stops being yours — literally underfoot.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_lapis_or: Lapis darkened from within. The Swarm uses it for something we haven't figured out yet.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_leaves.l: Crumbles into toxic fumes when touched. Don't inhale.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_log.lore: The tree still stands. But inside it's no longer a tree — Swarm spores have grown through it.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_player_c: Your face. Your armor. But inside — only the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_redstone: Redstone still works — but now it's strangely warm to the touch.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_skeleton: Every arrow carries a radiation dose. The Geiger counter won't quiet down.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_stone.lo: Stone that became part of the biomass. The Swarm uses it as a building material.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_worm_spa: Spawns an Infested Worm that tunnels and attacks from below.
A parasitic annelid that hosts Swarm spores, spreading infection as it moves.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_zombie_s: A chitin growth on the chest blocks frontal strikes. Flank it.
A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.iridium_axe: Ultra-durable axe. High damage, long service life.
tooltip.alien-invasion.iridium_hoe: Tills the land at the highest tier. Nothing more reliable.
tooltip.alien-invasion.iridium_pickaxe: Mines almost anything. Top tier — justifiably.
tooltip.alien-invasion.iridium_plate: A metal that shouldn't exist in such quantities. The Swarm brought it with them.
tooltip.alien-invasion.iridium_shovel: Bites into the ground instantly. Iridium knows no resistance.
tooltip.alien-invasion.iridium_sword: Iridium doesn't break. That's the most important thing to know about this sword.
tooltip.alien-invasion.light_hazmat_boot: You walk on infected ground in boots made from the skin of its creators. The irony doesn't help.
tooltip.alien-invasion.light_hazmat_ches: Every piece is the skin of a creature that came to kill you. Now it protects.
tooltip.alien-invasion.light_hazmat_helm: Sewn from alien hide — the material that knows how to bypass it. A full set creates a barrier against infection.
tooltip.alien-invasion.light_hazmat_legg: Flexible protection from Swarm biomaterial. A full set blocks spores from below.
tooltip.alien-invasion.nibirium_axe.func: Top-tier alloy tool. Weapons sweep nearby enemies. Tools break blocks in a 3x3 area.
tooltip.alien-invasion.nibirium_axe.lore: Capable of felling what shouldn't burn and shouldn't fall. It fells.
tooltip.alien-invasion.nibirium_hoe.func: Top-tier alloy tool. Weapons sweep nearby enemies. Tools break blocks in a 3x3 area.
tooltip.alien-invasion.nibirium_hoe.lore: Tills the soil with military precision.
tooltip.alien-invasion.nibirium_ingot.lo: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
Top-tier alloy tool. Weapons sweep nearby enemies. Tools break blocks in a 3x3 area.
Strikes in three dimensions at once. Miners call it cheating. They survive.
tooltip.alien-invasion.nibirium_shovel.f: Top-tier alloy tool. Weapons sweep nearby enemies. Tools break blocks in a 3x3 area.
tooltip.alien-invasion.nibirium_shovel.l: Digs cubic meters per second. Or builds a shelter before the Swarm arrives.
tooltip.alien-invasion.nibirium_sword.fu: Top-tier alloy tool. Weapons sweep nearby enemies. Tools break blocks in a 3x3 area.
tooltip.alien-invasion.nibirium_sword.lo: The nibirium blade cuts Swarm armor like paper. Every strike ripples outward to nearby enemies.
tooltip.alien-invasion.ore_washer.functi: Cleans raw ore from alien residue, increasing ingot yields.
tooltip.alien-invasion.ore_washer.lore: High-pressure jets of purified water scrub off the sticky purple biomass.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_anvil.f: Forge block for crafting elite palladium equipment and recipes.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_anvil.l: An anvil forged from lightweight palladium, humming with thermal energy.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_axe.fun: Extremely fast but less durable tool.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_axe.lor: A swift strike — and the tree falls before its shadow does. Durability isn't infinite, but it's enough.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_block.l: A shiny block that hums with slight thermal activity.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_boots.f: Agile defense. Full set caps maximum Radiation levels at 70%.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_boots.l: Lightweight palladium plates designed for agility and speed in combat.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_chestpl: Agile defense. Full set caps maximum Radiation levels at 70%.
Lightweight palladium plates designed for agility and speed in combat.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_chunk.l: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
Agile defense. Full set caps maximum Radiation levels at 70%.
Lightweight palladium plates designed for agility and speed in combat.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_hoe.fun: Extremely fast but less durable tool.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_hoe.lor: Quick, precise, no ceremony. The soil is ready before the next attack begins.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_ingot.l: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_legging: Agile defense. Full set caps maximum Radiation levels at 70%.
Lightweight palladium plates designed for agility and speed in combat.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_ore.fun: Rare ore block. Yields palladium chunks when mined.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_ore.lor: A thermal-conductive metal ore, warm to the touch.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_pickaxe: Extremely fast but less durable tool.
Faster than diamond. The ore doesn't have time to understand what happened.
Extremely fast but less durable tool.
Digs so fast the earth doesn't have time to settle back.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_sword.f: Extremely fast but less durable tool.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_sword.l: Fast and brutal. Cuts without hesitation. For those who act first and think second.
tooltip.alien-invasion.parasite_item.lor: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.parasite_spawn_eg: Leaps. Latches. Controls. The attempts to resist grow weaker.
tooltip.alien-invasion.planet_reactor.fu: A massive generator that processes high-energy cosmic cores.
tooltip.alien-invasion.planet_reactor.lo: Pulsing with blinding energy, it threatens to tear the fabric of local space.
tooltip.alien-invasion.plasma_bolt.lore: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.plasma_caster_spa: Fire rain without warning. Keep your distance.
tooltip.alien-invasion.plasma_cell.lore: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.plasma_core: A pulsing core with the surface temperature of a star. One wrong move and you'll know what a comet feels like.
tooltip.alien-invasion.plasma_hoe: Tills a field in one sweep. Fire-resistant, like all plasma gear.
tooltip.alien-invasion.plasma_pickaxe: Plasma melts rock before steel can strike. Very fast mining.
tooltip.alien-invasion.plasma_shovel: A superheated blade passes through soil without effort.
tooltip.alien-invasion.plasma_sword: A blade of compressed plasma. Fire doesn't touch it — it is fire.
tooltip.alien-invasion.plasma_turret.lor: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_anvil.fu: Forge block for crafting elite platinum equipment and recipes.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_anvil.lo: An anvil made of dense, cold platinum, designed to withstand cosmic strikes.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_axe.lore: A heavy blade of white metal. Strikes infrequently — but always decisively.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_block.lo: A heavy, dense block with a silver-white luster.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_boots.fu: Heavy diamond-level defense. Full set caps maximum Radiation levels at 70%.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_boots.lo: Made of dense, heavy platinum plates that absorb kinetic force.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_chestpla: Heavy diamond-level defense. Full set caps maximum Radiation levels at 70%.
Made of dense, heavy platinum plates that absorb kinetic force.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_chunk.lo: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_helmet.f: Heavy diamond-level defense. Full set caps maximum Radiation levels at 70%.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_helmet.l: Made of dense, heavy platinum plates that absorb kinetic force.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_hoe.lore: Contaminated soil resists. Platinum does not.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_ingot.lo: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_leggings: Heavy diamond-level defense. Full set caps maximum Radiation levels at 70%.
Made of dense, heavy platinum plates that absorb kinetic force.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_ore.func: Rare ore block. Yields platinum chunks when mined.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_ore.lore: Contains traces of heavy noble metal, resistant to environmental wear.
Slow, stubborn, reliable. Ore veins give way to platinum — as does anything that stands too long.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_shovel.l: Digs with dignity. The tool of those who build bunkers rather than flee from them.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_sword.lo: Sluggish like the metal itself, but holds its edge longer than any blade. Built to last — as long as the Swarm keeps coming.
tooltip.alien-invasion.portable_purifier: Cleanses infested blocks within arm's reach. Slowly. But it's better than nothing.
tooltip.alien-invasion.pure_radiation_bl: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.purified_water_fl: Clean water has become rare. This flask is a small reminder of the world before the invasion.
tooltip.alien-invasion.purifier.lore: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
Refines biological serums and purges infected materials.
A sterile workstation designed to isolate and cleanse Swarm pathogens.
tooltip.alien-invasion.purifier_wand.lor: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.rad_pills.lore: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.radiation_crystal: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.radio_transmitter: Used to communicate with orbital supply drops or send signals.
A crude array of dials and antennas, screaming into the void.
tooltip.alien-invasion.rally_banner: A raised banner — the signal to fight. Regeneration, protection, speed and absorption for everyone nearby.
tooltip.alien-invasion.raw_palladium.lor: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.raw_platinum.lore: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.sky_drone_spawn_e: There is no hiding in the sky. The drone hunts by the heat of living things.
tooltip.alien-invasion.star_cleaver: Born in the void. Every strike ripples outward to everyone standing nearby.
tooltip.alien-invasion.swarm_beacon.lore: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.swarm_mother_spaw: Spawns a Mother of the Swarm.
The source. The beginning. The end. She has been waiting since day one.
tooltip.alien-invasion.telekinetic_alien: The stones move on their own. It's not an illusion — it's telekinesis.
tooltip.alien-invasion.toxic_barrel.lore: Holds toxic water. Releases hazardous radiation if broken.
tooltip.alien-invasion.toxic_water_bucke: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.ufo_spawn_egg.lor: The beam takes without warning. None of those taken have returned.
tooltip.alien-invasion.uranium_axe: Works well on enemies and wood alike. Tested.
tooltip.alien-invasion.uranium_dust: Radioactive dust from fractured veins. Do not touch without protection. Prolonged exposure is inadvisable.
tooltip.alien-invasion.uranium_hoe: Tills the land well enough to survive on.
tooltip.alien-invasion.uranium_pickaxe: A uranium pickaxe — fast and durable. Mid-tier, but earned.
tooltip.alien-invasion.uranium_rod: A compressed uranium rod. The Swarm found a use for it long before we did.
tooltip.alien-invasion.uranium_shovel: Digs fast. Doesn't fear stone, much less soil.
tooltip.alien-invasion.uranium_sword: A reliable uranium alloy blade. Heavy, but it never lets you down.
tooltip.alien-invasion.warning_lamp.lore: Emits a bright orange warning pulse to signal danger.
tooltip.alien-invasion.weak_antidote.lor: A strange object brought by the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.herbal_brew.funct: Grants temporary resistance: infection builds up far slower for 2 minutes, and a little is shed at once.
tooltip.alien-invasion.herbal_brew.lore: A bitter brew of the last clean herbs. It won't cure you, but it buys time.
tooltip.alien-invasion.xenocrystal: Clear as a tear and sharp as a sting. The Swarm uses it instead of glass, silicon — instead of everything.
